debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
inst✝ : UnitalFreeStateTheory ι
i : ι
ρ : MState (H i)
ε : Prob
hε : 0 < ε ∧ ε < 1
σ : (n : ℕ) → ↑IsFree
ε' : Prob
hε'₁ : 0 < ε'
hε'₂ : ε' < ε
hR1R2 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ
hR1 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε ≠ ⊤
hR2 : @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ ≠ ⊤
ε₀ : ℝ := (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ - @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε).toReal * (↑ε - ↑ε') / (1 - ↑ε)
hε₀ : 0 < ε₀
hε₀' : ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀
m : ℕ
hm : m ≥ 1 ∧ 𝐃(statePow ρ m‖↑(σ m)) / ↑m < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ + ↑⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩
σ₁ : MState (H i)
hσ₁_pos : σ₁.m.PosDef
hσ₁_free : IsFree σ₁
«σ̃» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => @SteinsLemma.Lemma6_σn ι inst✝ i m σ₁ (↑(σ m)) n
σ_max_exists : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ x ∈ IsFree, IsMaxOn (fun σ => OptimalHypothesisRate (statePow ρ n) ε {σ}) IsFree x
«σ⋆» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => Classical.choose ⋯
σ' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => ⟨2 / 3, ⋯⟩[⟨1 / 2, ⋯⟩[«σ̃» n↔«σ⋆» n]↔statePow σ₁ n]
σ'_free : ∀ (n : ℕ), IsFree (σ' n)
σ'_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (σ' n).m.PosDef
mineig : ℝ := ⨅ i_1, ⋯.eigenvalues i_1
h_min_pos : 0 < mineig
h_min_le_one : mineig ≤ 1
c : ℕ → ℝ := fun n => Real.log (1 / mineig) + Real.log 3 / ↑(max n 1)
hc : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < c n
hc_lim : Filter.Tendsto (fun n => c n / ↑n) Filter.atTop (nhds 0)
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ := fun n lam => ↑⌈Real.log lam / c n⌉ * c n
h_le_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), Real.log lam ≤ f n lam
h_f_le : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), f n lam < Real.log lam + c n
σ''_unnormalized : (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => (↑(σ' n)).cfc fun e => Real.exp (f n e)
σ''_unnormalized_PosDef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (↑(σ''_unnormalized n)).PosDef
h_exp_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ), 0 < x → x ≤ Real.exp (f n x) ∧ Real.exp (f n x) < Real.exp (c n) * x
σ''_tr_bounds : ∀ (n : ℕ), 1 ≤ (σ''_unnormalized n).trace ∧ (σ''_unnormalized n).trace < Real.exp (c n)
σ'' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) :=
  fun n => { M := (σ''_unnormalized n).trace⁻¹ • σ''_unnormalized n, zero_le := ⋯, tr := ⋯ }
σ''_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (↑↑(σ'' n)).PosDef
σ'_le_σ'' : ∀ (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-c n) • ↑(σ' n) ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
σ''_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≤ Real.exp (c n) • ↑(σ' n)
ℰ : (n : ℕ) → CPTPMap (H (i ^ n)) (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => pinching_map (σ'' n)
hσ'n_eq_sum_third : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ' n) = (1 / 3) • ↑(«σ̃» n) + (1 / 3) • ↑(«σ⋆» n) + (1 / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n)
hσ₁_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), (1 / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n) ≤ ↑(σ' n)
hliminf :
  Filter.liminf (fun n => 𝐃(statePow ρ n‖σ' n) / ↑n) Filter.atTop =
    Filter.liminf (fun n => 𝐃((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)‖σ'' n) / ↑n) Filter.atTop
«hσ''_ge_σ⋆» : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(«σ⋆» n)
«hσ''_ge_σ̃» : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(«σ̃» n)
hσ''_ge_σ₁ : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n)
hc_littleO : (fun n => c n + Real.log 3) =o[Filter.atTop] fun x => ↑x
hliminf_le :
  Filter.liminf (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) ε {σ'' n}).negLog / ↑n) Filter.atTop ≤
    ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε))
hlimsup_le :
  ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
    0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
      Filter.limsup (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) (1 - ε1) {σ'' n}).negLog / ↑n)
          Filter.atTop ≤
        ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩)
P1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
P2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le
      ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
hPcomm : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute ↑(P1 ε2 n) ↑(P2 ε2 n)
hliminfP1 :
  ∀ (ε2 : NNReal),
    0 < ε2 → Filter.liminf (fun n => (P1 (↑ε2) n).inner ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n)) Filter.atTop ≤ 1 - ↑ε
hlimsupP2 :
  ∀ (ε2 : NNReal),
    0 < ε2 →
      ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
        0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
          Filter.limsup
              (fun n =>
                ((Real.exp (↑n * (↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩) + ↑ε2)) •
                          ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le
                      ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n)).inner
                  ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n))
              Filter.atTop ≤
            1 - ↑(1 - ε1)
hlimsupP2' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ), 0 < ε2 → Filter.limsup (fun n => (P2 ε2 n).inner ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))) Filter.atTop = 0
E1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := 1 - P1
E2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P1 - P2
E3 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P2
Esum : E1 + E2 + E3 = 1
hE1proj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E1 ε2 n =
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE2leProj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E2 ε2 n ≤
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE1leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner
          (@SteinsLemma.HermitianMat.mul_commute (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) ((1 / ↑n) • E1 ε2 n)
            ((↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))).log - (↑(σ'' n)).log)
            (@SteinsLemma.commute_aux✝ (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) (DecEqH (i ^ n)) n
              (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) (E1 ε2 n) ↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))
              ↑(σ'' n) ⋯ ⋯)) ≤
        (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner ((ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) • E1 ε2 n)
hE2leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E2 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log) ≤
        (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2) • ↑(E2 ε2 n)
c' : ℝ → ℕ → ℝ := fun ε2 n => max (c n + c n / ↑n) (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)
hc' : ∀ (ε2 : ℕ → NNReal), (∀ (n : ℕ), ε2 n < 1) → ∃ C, ∀ᶠ (n : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, c' (↑(ε2 n)) n ≤ ↑C
hσ'' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-↑n * c' ε2 n) • 1 ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
ε2✝ : ℝ
n✝ : ℕ
ε2 : ℝ
n : ℕ
hε2 : 0 < ε2
⊢ (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E3 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log) ≤ (1 / n) • ↑(E3 ε2 n) * -↑(↑(σ'' n)).log
